validation_results.summary: candidate-check returns PASS with zero findings after human approval metadata is applied
review decision binds the approved P2 lock creation readiness subject hash with zero findings
approved input review_id, review file hash, subject hash, and APPROVED decision are bound to current review decision files
tooling/create_spec_lock.py dry-run creates a schema-valid P2 lock object without writing control/locks/P2_SPEC_LOCK.json

validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json, subprocess; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-LOCK-CREATION-READINESS'); report=json.loads((root/'SPEC_LOCK_DRY_RUN_VALIDATION_REPORT.json').read_text()); cmd=report['command']; proc=subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True, text=True, capture_output=True); assert proc.returncode==0; lock=json.loads(proc.stdout); assert lock['lock_id']==report['expected_lock_id']; assert lock['phase']==report['expected_phase']; assert lock['root_sha256']==report['expected_root_sha256']; assert lock['review_decision_file_root_sha256']==report['expected_review_decision_file_root_sha256']; assert lock['schema']['path']==report['actual_schema_path']; assert lock['source_candidate']['candidate_path']==report['actual_source_candidate_path']; assert len(lock['files'])==report['actual_file_entry_count']==3; assert not Path(report['real_lock_output_path']).exists(); print('PASS')"
validation_results.summary: dry-run JSON output is parsed and bound to expected lock id, phase, root, review file root, schema, source candidate, and file count

validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-LOCK-CREATION-READINESS'); bundle=json.loads((root/'SPEC_LOCK_INPUT_BUNDLE.json').read_text()); report=json.loads((root/'SPEC_LOCK_DRY_RUN_VALIDATION_REPORT.json').read_text()); assert bundle['status']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN_AWAITING_EXPLICIT_LOCK_CREATION_REQUEST'; assert bundle['human_review']['status']=='APPROVED_BY_HUMAN'; assert bundle['real_lock_output']['approval_preflight_status']=='PASS_OUTPUT_PATH_AVAILABLE'; assert report['real_lock_output_path_preflight_status']=='PASS_OUTPUT_PATH_AVAILABLE'; assert report['real_lock_creation_status']=='NOT_WRITTEN'; assert not Path(bundle['real_lock_output']['path']).exists(); print('PASS')"
validation_results.summary: approved readiness candidate records human approval and confirms the real lock output path is still absent

validation_results.command: python3 -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-LOCK-CREATION-READINESS'); scope=json.loads((root/'SCOPE_REPORT.json').read_text()); assert all(Path(p).is_file() for p in scope['actual_writes']); assert not scope['forbidden_write_violations']; assert all(p.startswith('build_program/phases/P2/candidates/P2-SPEC-LOCK-CREATION-READINESS/') for p in scope['actual_writes']); assert scope['control_files_modified'] is False; assert scope['lock_created'] is False; print('PASS')"
validation_results.summary: scope report actual writes exist, stay inside the readiness candidate path, do not include control writes, and no lock is created
